failed_attempts.sql: WITH pubs AS (SELECT p.id AS publication_id, ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, 'english'::regconfig, to_tsquery('english','Tutto Nhoque')) AS relevance FROM publication p), profs_with_biography AS (SELECT r.id as profile_id, COALESCE(pr.destination_profile_id, pr.origin_profile_id) AS restaurant_id, t.username, MAX(p.relevance) OVER () AS related_publication_id, ts_rank(t.biography_lexemes, 'english'::regconfig, to_tsquery('english','Tutto Nhoque')) AS username_relevance FROM pubs p JOIN profile_collaborations pc ON p.publication_id = pc.publication_id JOIN publication_collab pc2 ON pc2.publication_id = p.publication_id AND (pc.collaborators = true OR pc.collaboratinon_id IS NULL OR pc.parent_publication_id IS NULL) JOIN comment c ON pc2.profile_id = c.profile_id  JOIN publiaiton p2 ON p2.id = p.related_publication_id JOIN profile t ON t.id = COALESCE(pc.destination_profile_id,pc.origin_profile_id) ), restaurants AS (SELECT profs_with_biography.restaurant_id , MAX(t.username_relevance) as username_relevance FROM profs_with_biography Join restaurant ON profs_with_biography.restaurant_id = restarunt.id GROUP BY profs_with_biography.restaurant_id ORDER BY  username_relevance DESC LIMIT 10;

WITH pubs AS (SELECT p.id AS publication_id, ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, 'english'::regconfig, to_tsquery('english','Tutto Nhoque')) AS relevance FROM publication p) , profs_with_biography AS (SELECT r.publication_id as profile_id, COALESCE(pr.destination_profile_id, pr.origin_profile_id) AS restaurant_id, p.relevance FROM pubs p JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.publication_id = pr.destination_profile_id), restaurants AS (SELECT profs_with_biography.restaurant_id , MAX(profs_with_biography.profile_id) OVER () AS related_publication_id, ts_rank(t.biography_lexemes, 'english'::regconfig, to_tsquery('english','Tutto Nhoque')) AS username_relevance FROM pubs p JOIN publication_collab pc ON p.publication_id = pc.publication_id AND (pc.collaborators = true OR pc.collaboration_id IS NULL OR pc.parent_publication_id IS NULL) JOIN comment c ON pc2.profile_id = c.profile_id  JOIN publiaiton p2 ON p2.id = p.related_publication_id JOIN profile t ON profs_with_biography.restaurant_id = t.id GROUP BY profs_with_biography.restaurant_id ORDER BY username_relevance DESC LIMIT 10;
